description: CompositionBlack round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 30% polyester and 70% cotton, has graphic print on the front, with grey fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, tri panelled stripes from the neckline to the hem of the sleeve, logo on the back of the neck in reflective materialFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean A puma is an embodiment of speed and grace, coupled with a fierce attitude. You can show the world that you are all of these by donning this black tee, which has a large puma on the front of the t-shirt in grey. The white stripes on the shoulder up the style quotient. Wear it with jeans, chinos or shorts, and rest assured, nobody will dare to mess with you again!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
